ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dances" (
  "dance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dance */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the dance was performed */,
  "dance_name" TEXT /* Name of the dance */,
  "dance_style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dance style */,
  "choreographer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the choreographer */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the dance in minutes */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the dance (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the dance performance */,
  "date_performed" TEXT /* Date when the dance was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dances_choreographer_id FOREIGN KEY ("choreographer_id") REFERENCES choreographers ("choreographer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dances_dance_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("dance_style_id") REFERENCES dance_styles ("dance_style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dance_styles" (
  "dance_style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dance style */,
  "dance_style_name" TEXT /* Name of the dance style (e.g., Lyrical, Acrobatic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dance style */,
  "tutorial_url" TEXT /* URL to a tutorial or instructional video for the dance style */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* A measure of the style's popularity (e.g., number of times performed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dance_style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "choreographers" (
  "choreographer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each choreographer */,
  "choreographer_name" TEXT /* Name of the choreographer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the choreographer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the choreographer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the choreographer's website or portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("choreographer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dancers" (
  "dancer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dancer */,
  "dancer_name" TEXT /* Name of the dancer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the dancer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the dancer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the dancer */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the dancer in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the dancer in kilograms */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the dancer's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dancer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dance_dancers" (
  "dance_dancer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dance-dancer association */,
  "dance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dance */,
  "dancer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dancer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the dancer in the dance (e.g., Lead, Backup) */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dancer participated in the dance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dance_dancer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dance_dancers_dance_id FOREIGN KEY ("dance_id") REFERENCES dances ("dance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dance_dancers_dancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dancer_id") REFERENCES dancers ("dancer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organization hosting the competition */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the competition */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the competition's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Solo, Group) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points or score associated with the award */,
  "prize" TEXT /* Prize or reward associated with the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dance_competition_awards" (
  "dance_competition_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dance-competition-award association */,
  "dance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dance */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the dance in the competition */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score received in the competition */,
  "judge_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the judges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dance_competition_award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dance_competition_awards_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dance_competition_awards_dance_id FOREIGN KEY ("dance_id") REFERENCES dances ("dance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dance_competition_awards_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., instructor, dancer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (encrypted) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "dance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dance being accessed */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the information was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dance_id FOREIGN KEY ("dance_id") REFERENCES dances ("dance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
